displayName: Mild/Structural Steel (A36, backstop and building material)
notes: Mild structural steel per ASTM A36. Yield ~250 MPa, UTS ~400 MPa. BHN ~110-130. RHAe ~0.5-0.6 per mm vs KE (varies by threat — lower vs AP, higher vs fragments). Used for backstop plates, construction, ship hulls, and non-armor structural elements. Ductile failure produces fewer secondary fragments than RHA.

source.reference: ASTM A36 standard, universal steel property data
source.methodology: RHAe estimated from Brinell hardness ratio to RHA 280 BHN: ~120/280 = 0.43, adjusted upward to 0.5-0.6 based on empirical ballistic data for structural steel plates. Density per ASTM A36.
